description: We are looking for a Data Scientist to analyze large datasets and build predictive models. You will work with cross-functional teams to deliver data-driven solutions.
Build and deploy ML models at scale. Work on recommendation systems and NLP pipelines. Collaborate with data engineers and product teams.
Analyze business data and create dashboards. Work with stakeholders to define KPIs and deliver actionable insights.
Design and implement NLP models for language understanding tasks. Work on transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, and text classification.
Build scalable backend services and APIs. Work with microservices architecture and cloud infrastructure.
Develop responsive web applications using React. Collaborate with designers and backend engineers.
Build end-to-end features for our music platform. Work across frontend and backend systems.
Manage CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure. Automate deployment processes and monitor system health.
Design and maintain data pipelines. Work with large-scale distributed systems and real-time data processing.
Conduct research on reinforcement learning and neural architectures. Publish findings and implement novel algorithms.
Create BI reports and dashboards. Translate business requirements into analytical solutions.
Develop computer vision algorithms for autonomous driving. Work on object detection and image segmentation.
Design and implement cloud solutions on AWS and Azure. Lead cloud migration projects.
Monitor and respond to security incidents. Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing.
Define product roadmap and work with engineering teams. Analyze user data to drive product decisions.
Design and build scalable software systems. Participate in code reviews and technical design discussions.
Develop control systems and algorithms for robotic platforms. Work on motion planning and sensor fusion.
Build decentralized applications and smart contracts. Work on blockchain infrastructure and security.
Build iOS and Android applications. Work on performance optimization and user experience.
Ensure platform reliability and performance. Build monitoring systems and respond to incidents.
